title: hieracium angustatum subsp. microcymon
intro: Hieracium angustatum subsp. microcymon is a subspecies of the Hieracium angustatum plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and commonly known as a type of hawkweed. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium angustatum subsp. microcymon include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and therapeutic benefits.
